subject: SOCDS 2025/26 Update Week #20 - PreK Orange
text:
Email Ms. Annemarie
Half Way - Week #20
We are officially halfway through the school year, and it’s a wonderful moment to pause and reflect on just how much your children have grown — emotionally and socially.  These months of shared routines, language, and experiences are what build that foundation of trust and connection — and it shows in the way your children move through their days with increasing independence and empathy.
We see growing confidence, stronger self-advocacy, deeper friendships, and a beautiful sense of responsibility toward one another. Our classrooms truly feel like communities now, where children look out for each 
other, solve problems together, and take pride in belonging.
As part of this mid-year reflection and partnership, we will be scheduling
Zoom parent teacher conferences for the end of February
. These conversations are an important opportunity to connect, share observations, celebrate growth, and talk together about how best to continue supporting your child’s development through the rest of the year. More details and sign-up information will be coming 
soon.
Music Presentations
As your children have likely shared, each class is exploring different musical genres and preparing a “museum-style” experience to share with the rest of the school. In December, we tried to do all of the sharing in one day, and it felt a bit rushed — and like a lot to take in!
For our
Music Museums
, we’ll spread the visits out over the week. This will give everyone time to truly enjoy each presentation and allow every child the space to share their ideas, interests, and favorites with their schoolmates.
Thank you for your partnership and support.
Inclement Weather
The weekend weather might spread into Monday.
South Orange Country Day School follows the lead of the South Orange–Maplewood Public School District when it comes to weather-related closures. If the South Orange–Maplewood schools are closed due to inclement 
weather, we will also be closed. If the district announces a delayed opening (of any duration), SOCDS will open at
10:00 AM
for all students.
I will also send an eblast as soon as I learn of the decision.
As always, preschool attendance is not mandatory. If you feel your child would be safer staying home or being picked up early, please do whatever you feel is best—just be sure to let us know your 
plans.
If you have any questions or concerns please text (1-646-226-8790) or email learn@socds.com.
Annemarie
Art with Ms. Jenny
Ms. Jenny created space for children to create their peace doves in honor of Martin Luther King's message of hope and peace.  The winter weather continued to inspire your children with interpretations of trees, bears, and some squirrels too.
And, of course, painting in the snow is so much fun!
Upcoming
Don't forget Lunch Orders for February
Friday, January 30th - PEP Spirit Day Pizza Cupcake Lunch
February 2nd. Groundhog Day
around February 6th - 100th Day of School
February 13th - Wear Red Day
February 16th - SOCDS Closed for Presidents Day
Feb. 17th - Lunar New Year
Friday, Feb. 28th - 
PEP Spirit Day Pizza Cupcake Lunch
Updated School Calendar
Class Directory
SimplyGourmet Lunch Link
SOCDS Summer Camp 2025 - March 1st Early Registration
@SOCDSMOMENTS
Logistics
Dress Appropriately for the Weather:
Please dress your child in appropriate gear for the day.  There is no bad weather just poor clothing.
Morning Snack
:  Please send in a morning, and if your child is staying for enrichment please send in an afternoon snack as well.  We generally allow children to choose their food and to listen to their bodies, but if you have any particular preference for what they eat and when, please just label the containers and we will accommodate.  Please remember we are a NUT FREE environment.
Water Bottles
:  Please send in a labeled water bottle with your child each day.  We do make sure that they drink water 
throughout the day.  We have two water fountains which we use to refill the bottles (so they may come home full.)
Parking:
Please remember that Vose Avenue is an active busy street.  Please pull up on the
school side
of Vose in front of the school.  It is safest to go around the block instead of turning around in driveways.  For your child's safety please try to have them leave your car from the sidewalk side of the car.
Please do not block our neighbors driveway, even for a few minutes.
Tuition:
As I receive payments I update the statement and send you a copy.  If you do not receive those from me please let me know.
Hours
Morning Care 7:30-8:30am
Morning Drop off is between 8:30-9am
Afternoon Pick Up is between 3:10- 3:20pm
Extended Day 3:20-5:30/5:45pm
South Orange Country Day School
461 Vose Avenue, South Orange
973.762.6451
You are receiving this email because your child attends SOCDS.  If you no longer wish to receive these updates, please unsubscribe below.
